authorship: Original vector compositions authored for The Waking Tower runtime. No external art, stock imagery, model weights, or third-party source files were incorporated.
license: Project-owned; distributed under the repository license for this runtime use.
releaseBoundary: This pack completes the authored Waking Tower Hall environment, lead portrait, and framing layer. It does not claim every encounter, item, or planetary surface has a bespoke full-frame illustration.
